script: BURL=$(az keyvault secret show --vault-name SDN-YooVault --name edge-bridge-url --query value -o tsv); BTOK=$(az keyvault secret show --vault-name SDN-YooVault --name edge-bridge-token --query value -o tsv); curl -s -m 15 -X POST -H "Authorization: Bearer $BTOK" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' $BURL/edge/execute_js --data '{"tab_url_contains":"admin.teams.microsoft.com","js":"location.href = \"https://admin.teams.microsoft.com/policies/manage-apps/922fe8e1-c937-4d74-a73f-66fcfc26da10/users-and-groups?action=installs\"; \"nav\""}'
